parameters.query:
INSERT INTO publications
  (student_id, type_publication, titre, message, prix_vente, localisation, image_url, status, vues, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES
  (
    {{ $json.student_id }},
    '{{ $json.type_publication }}',
    '{{ $json.titre.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    '{{ $json.message.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    {{ $json.prix_vente }},
    {{ $json.localisation ? ('\'' + $json.localisation.replace(/'/g, "''") + '\'') : 'NULL' }},
    {{ $json.image_url    ? ('\'' + $json.image_url.replace(/'/g, "''")    + '\'') : 'NULL' }},
    'ACTIVE',
    0,
    NOW(),
    NOW()
  );
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS publication_id;
